preReview.title: St. Louis City SC v Columbus Crew: Gazdag takes pride in joining 'successful' visitors
preReview.description: Daniel Gazdag made the switch to Columbus Crew on Thursday, and he is raring to go with his new team in MLS against St. Louis City SC.

QAData.question: Who won between St. Louis City and Columbus Crew on Sun, 13 Apr 2025 23:00:00 GMT?
QAData.answer: Columbus Crew won 2–1 over St. Louis City on Sun, 13 Apr 2025 23:00:00 GMT.
